title: Greatest Love of All
why_this_song: Greatest Love of All by Whitney Houston (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I believe the children are our future
Teach them well and let them lead the way
Show them all the beauty they possess inside
Never to walk in anyone's shadows
If I fail, if I succeed
At least I'll live as I believe

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "greatest" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "greatest" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "believe" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "believe" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I believe the children are our future
Because the greatest love of all
At least I'll live as I believe

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Show them all the beauty they possess inside
It is the greatest love of all

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Greatest Love of All" was released in 1985. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Greatest Love of All" foi lançada em 1985. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Greatest Love of All" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Greatest Love of All" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
